user_prompt: Filter the LinkedIn results to roles where the company has under 200 employees.
actual_output:
### LinkedIn Filter Applied: Company Size <200

Filtering original 34 LinkedIn results from your campaign...

### Filter Results

| Filter Stage | Count |
|---|---|
| Original LinkedIn matches | 34 |
| Met $150K+ / Senior criteria | 22 |
| Companies with <200 employees | **14** |
| Removed (200+ employees) | 8 |

### Qualifying Companies (14)

| Company | Size | Role | Comp Range | Match Tier |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Ramp-adjacent fintech (stealth) | ~45 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $165–195K | Tier 1 |
| Clay | ~80 | Sr. React Engineer | $170–210K | Tier 1 |
| Mintlify | ~55 | Frontend Lead | $160–200K | Tier 1 |
| Hex | ~150 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $175–215K | Tier 1 |
| Vanta (NYC office) | ~180 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $180–220K | Tier 1 |
| Arc | ~30 | Founding Frontend | $160–190K + equity | Tier 2 |
| Causal | ~60 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $155–185K | Tier 2 |
| Speak | ~90 | Sr. React Eng | $165–195K | Tier 2 |
| Replo | ~40 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $150–180K | Tier 2 |
| Warp | ~75 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $170–200K | Tier 2 |
| Magic (magic.dev) | ~50 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $180–230K | Tier 2 |
| Levels.fyi | ~25 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $160–190K | Tier 3 |
| Pylon | ~35 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $155–185K | Tier 3 |
| Stytch | ~120 | Sr. Frontend Eng | $170–205K | Tier 3 |

### Removed (200+ employees)
Stripe, Datadog, Asana, Notion, Figma, Plaid, Brex, Airtable

### Updated Campaign Totals

| Source | Qualified Apps |
|---|---|
| LinkedIn (filtered) | 14 |
| Indeed | 18 |
| Greenhouse | 12 |
| Lever | 9 |
| **New Total** | **53 → 33** |

### Strategy Note

Smaller companies (<200) typically mean:
- Faster hiring loops (often 2–3 weeks vs. 6–8)
- Direct access to hiring managers — worth personalizing cover letters more aggressively
- Higher equity component — flag any roles where base is borderline but total comp is strong
- Less ATS automation — your custom cover letter matters more than keyword density

**Recommendation:** Bump all 14 LinkedIn jobs to Tier 1 treatment given the smaller team dynamic. The ROI per application is higher.

Want me to apply the same <200 filter to Indeed, Greenhouse, and Lever results, or keep those at original criteria?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully complied with the user's request by filtering the data according to the specified company size and providing a detailed, updated report.
